children.name: Presentation API
auth
logs in with valid credentials and returns a token
rejects invalid credentials with a 401 error envelope
rejects an unknown email with the same 401 envelope (S6 constant-time path)
provisions a connected OLX marketplace for a new workspace on register
cleans up provisioned workspace and marketplace if user creation fails
products
returns 401 when unauthenticated
returns the §18 paginated envelope on list
returns a VALIDATION_ERROR envelope with field details on invalid create
creates a product and returns 201 with the success envelope
creates a draft OLX listing for a product
rejects duplicate listing creation for the same marketplace
rejects draft listing creation for a disconnected marketplace
maps concurrent duplicate listing persistence to a conflict response
hermes
approves a pending event (happy path)
returns 422 when approving a non-pending event
returns a 404 error envelope for an unknown event
unmatched routes
returns a 404 envelope for unknown /api routes
E2E product/listing/Hermes flow (in-memory, no DB)
logs in and returns the current principal via /auth/me
creates a product then lists it back for the workspace
publishes a listing and finalizes it live in the store (handler fix)
relist performs an actual republish (not a no-op) and finalizes live (C6)
relist rejects a sold product (invariant enforced) (C6)
runs Hermes for the workspace (endpoint returns 202)
approves a pending Hermes event and applies the change (verify applied)
IDOR: workspace A cannot reach workspace B resources (S2)
GET /products/:idB -> 404
PATCH /products/:idB -> 404 (no mutation)
DELETE /products/:idB -> 404 (no delete)
GET /products/:idB/listings -> 404
GET /listings/:idB -> 404
PATCH /listings/:idB (price) -> 404
POST /listings/:idB/publish -> 404 (no cross-tenant publish)
GET /marketplaces/:idB -> 404
POST /hermes/events/:idB/approve -> 404 (event untouched)
GET /hermes/events/:idB -> 404
PATCH /workspaces/:idB operates on the caller OWN workspace, not B
GET /workspaces/:idB returns the caller OWN workspace (A)
SyncMarketplaceHandler
resolves the adapter by key and returns its sync results
persists fetched stats onto listings and records the marketplace sync (C5)
records a marketplace sync error and rethrows when the adapter fails (C5)
PublishListingHandler
publishes via the adapter and emits a listing.published event
works without an event publisher
finalizes the listing via the injected finalizer and defers the event to it
throws (does NOT report success) when finalization fails after a successful publish (CR3)
on retry with an already-published listing, finalizes WITHOUT calling adapter.publish again (CR2/CR3)
publishes normally when the probe reports the listing is not yet published (CR3)
HermesRunHandler
runs the injected engine and emits a completion event
HermesDecisionEngine.determineAutonomy
suggest_only
sends everything to pending_review
full_auto
auto-applies normal suggestions
still routes critical competitor price detections to review
balanced
auto-applies safe types only
routes non-safe types to review
HermesDecisionEngine.run
auto-applies a safe info suggestion under full_auto and persists events
keeps suggestions pending under suggest_only
HermesDecisionEngine guardrails (C1 / AMENDMENT FIX #5)
auto-applies a within-guardrail price change under full_auto
forces review when autoAdjustPricing is disabled, even under full_auto
forces review when the change exceeds maxAutoPriceChangePct, even under full_auto
forces review when the new margin is below minMarginFloor, even under full_auto
passesGuardrails honours per-action master switches
PostgreSQL repositories (integration)
round-trips a Product aggregate with tags and images
round-trips a Marketplace and Listing, and finds expiring listings
persists Hermes events and queries pending review
records activity log entries (append-only)
ProductMapper
maps columns, Money and child collections
parses numeric decimal prices as well as strings
ListingMapper
maps a live listing with all fields
maps nullable columns to null
MarketplaceMapper
maps a connected marketplace
maps a disconnected marketplace with null lastSync
EventMapper
maps a price event with typed proposed change
maps an informational event with null proposed change and null product
WorkspaceMapper
maps workspace columns and defaults guardrails
ActivityLogMapper
maps an entry, converting null actorId to undefined
keeps actorId when present and null metadata becomes undefined
OLXAdapter
maps domain input to the OLX ad payload and returns the external id
maps a synced OLX ad to the domain SyncedListing shape
returns [] for sync with no ids without calling the transport
normalizes 401 to MarketplaceAuthenticationError
normalizes 404 to MarketplaceNotFoundError
retries retryable rate-limit failures then succeeds (idempotent updateListing)
gives up after exhausting retries and throws the rate-limit error (updateListing)
does NOT retry publish on a 5xx failure (no duplicate POST)
does NOT retry publish on a 429 failure (no duplicate POST)
works against its default stub transport with no injected client
ApproveHermesEventUseCase
applies a pending price change: updates product, records history and marks applied
rejects approving an event that is not pending_review
returns NOT_FOUND for an unknown event
returns NOT_FOUND when approving an event from another workspace (IDOR, S2)
AuthUserMapper
maps snake_case columns to the AuthUserRecord shape
normalizes a null workspace_id
coerces string timestamps to Date
PriceHistoryMapper
maps columns, coerces DECIMAL strings to numbers and ISO-serializes the date
maps a null old_price to undefined and a null reason to undefined
HermesCompletionClient
posts OpenAI-compatible chat completions to Hermes API Server
throws a redacted high-level error when Hermes returns an error response
throws when a successful Hermes response has no assistant content
throws when a successful Hermes response is not JSON
sends a Hermes session key only when request scope is provided
throws a clear error when the Hermes request times out
AuthUserRepository / PriceHistoryRepository (integration)
creates and reads back a user (workspace-less)
returns an empty price history for an unknown listing
HermesAI (IAIProvider)
suggestPrice returns the typed PriceSuggestion shape and passes a JSON schema
suggestPrice falls back to current price / low confidence on unparseable output
suggestPrice tolerates JSON wrapped in a fenced code block
generateTitle returns a cleaned single-line title and includes marketplace context
generateTitle falls back to the product name on empty model output
analyzeListing clamps the score and returns string suggestions
EmailProvider
sends through the injected transport, applying the default from address
rejects a message without a recipient
reports stubbed=false when a real (non-stub) transport is used
SendGridHttpTransport (C3 real transport)
POSTs to the SendGrid API and returns the message id; reports non-stub
throws (never claims delivered) on a non-2xx SendGrid response
createEmailProvider factory (C3)
warns and falls back to stub when only SMTP_URL is set (no silent delivery)
stubs quietly when no email credentials are configured
TelegramBot
sends via the injected client and returns the message id
throws when no chatId is provided or configured
RunHermesUseCase
runs the engine and persists generated events
fails when the workspace is missing
exposes generated events as presented views via the application service
Product invariants
creates a valid product with default draft status
rejects a description shorter than 20 chars
rejects a description longer than 2000 chars
rejects a negative selling price
rejects sellingPrice below costPrice by default
allows sellingPrice below costPrice when allowBelowCost is set (bulk-edit)
Product status transitions (forward-only)
allows draft -> active -> attention -> sold
forbids reverse transitions (active -> draft)
forbids any transition out of sold
canPublish is true while not sold
Product price / description updates
rejects updating selling price below cost by default
accepts a below-cost update when explicitly allowed
validates description length on update
HermesLiveUpdates
rejects an unauthenticated connection (CR4)
rejects a connection with an invalid token (CR4)
accepts an authed connection and binds its workspace from the token (CR4)
does not deliver events for a different workspace (CR5)
delivers nothing to a client with no bound workspace — fail closed (CR5)
PublishListingUseCase
rejects publishing when the marketplace is not connected
enqueues a publish job and logs intent when connected
returns NOT_FOUND for an unknown listing
HermesEvent creation invariants
requires a typed price change for price events
creates a valid price event as pending_review by default
allows a null change for informational photo suggestions
HermesEvent approval rules
approves a pending event and transitions to applied
cannot approve twice
dismisses a pending event
cannot dismiss an applied event
HermesEvent requiresHumanReview
is true for critical competitor price detections
is true for price drops greater than 20%
is false for small price drops
buildContainer (composition root)
populates every required AppDeps field
wires the optional ports (price history + id generator)
builds an Express app from the resolved deps without throwing
exposes a functioning WS event subscriber fed by the broker
propagates a Hermes-run failure through the job handler (C2)
exposes lifecycle handles and a resolving shutdown()
CreateProductUseCase
creates a product, persists it and emits an event (happy path)
fails validation when the description is too short
fails when the workspace does not exist
rejects a duplicate SKU with a conflict
Listing publish rules
publishes when marketplace connected and product not sold
refuses to publish to a disconnected marketplace
refuses to publish a sold product
requires an external listing id
RedisEventBroker
XADDs the event to the per-aggregate stream with flattened fields
returns an empty string when XADD yields null
EventPublisher (IEventPublisher)
delegates publishing to the injected broker
resolves void even though the broker returns an id
Listing lifecycle
expires a live listing and relists it
detects expiry from a past expiresAt
RedisCache
round-trips a typed value with the configured key prefix
uses SETEX when a positive TTL is supplied
returns null on a miss
returns null (treats as miss) on corrupt JSON
deletes a key
Money
creates from a major-unit decimal and exposes minor units
rejects non-finite amounts
rejects invalid currency codes
adds and subtracts same-currency amounts
refuses cross-currency arithmetic
multiplies by a scalar
compares amounts and reports equality
computes fractional change (a 20% drop)
is immutable (frozen)
formats and stringifies
resolveJwtSecret (S1 fail-closed JWT secret)
production
throws when the secret is unset
throws when the secret is an empty string
throws when the secret is still a your_-prefixed placeholder
returns a real, non-placeholder secret unchanged
development
returns a clearly-marked dev-only value when unset
does not fall back to a your_-prefixed placeholder
returns a real configured secret unchanged
MarketplaceAdapterFactory
creates the olx adapter with a matching key
creates the allegro adapter with a matching key
creates the vinted adapter with a matching key
creates the facebook adapter with a matching key
creates the ebay adapter with a matching key
reports supported vs unsupported keys
throws MarketplaceNotImplementedError for unregistered keys
returns the eBay stub adapter whose operations reject as not implemented
